About

We Create the Brands
You Need

Amid the diverse lifestyles, needs, generations, and skin types you have, we began with the belief that everyone deserves a brand that truly fits them.

By bringing together brands designed for your unique needs, we aim to enrich and diversify your beauty lifestyle.

Discovering needs, improving them, and transforming them into refined products and meaningful content — that is what UNITBRAND does.

UNITBRAND strives to offer the best value at the same level of quality, always considering a better life and greater satisfaction for our customers.

Without limiting ourselves to any one field, we listen carefully to everything you believe you need. In this rapidly changing era, we aspire to present a wide range of brands that go beyond boundaries and limitations.

"We think about the brands people truly need within their diverse lifestyles and everyday lives. Experiences that naturally blend into daily life — that is the value UNITBRAND creates."

The Three Values of UNITBRAND

What We Believe In

01

Brands You Truly Need

"A Brand That Truly Fits You"

Amid diverse lifestyles and needs, we carefully consider the brands and products people truly need.

02

Meaningful Product Experiences

"To Naturally Blend Into Everyday Life"

Through quality ingredients and thoughtful product experiences, we propose a better beauty lifestyle.

03

Lasting Value

"Beyond Just a Brand"

Rather than following fast-changing trends, we focus on creating brands with lasting value.

FAQ

Is it possible to receive catalogs and price lists? +

Yes, please contact us via the Contact form or email and we will send our latest catalog and price list.

Is overseas export and distribution available? +

Yes, we actively support overseas export and distribution. Please reach out with your country and scope.

Is sample support available? +

Sample support is available depending on the product and quantity.

Is product supply available by brand? +

Yes, supply is available per brand (RUNSLOW, AUDEW, AILL).

How does the OBM process work? +

8 stages from Consultation to Mass Production. Lead time approx. 3 months.

Is product customization available? +

Yes, formula and packaging customization is available through our OBM process.

How long does production usually take? +

Standard production takes approx. 3 months. Reorders within 1 month.
